_meta.purpose: Machine-readable task specifications. Claude writes these. Junior AI reads and implements exactly as specified. Do not deviate from spec without checking with Claude first.

_conventions.coordinate_system: Arcade default — Y up, origin bottom-left screen
_conventions.local_ship_space: Origin = ship centre, Y up, 0 degrees = facing up
_conventions.data_pattern: Data-driven. No hardcoded geometry. Load from JSON via load_library()
_conventions.file_format: Category JSON files: ships.json, stations.json, derelicts.json, junk.json
arcade_breaking_changes: Window.__init__ does NOT accept background_color= kwarg. Use arcade.set_background_color() separately.
SpriteCircle manual __init__ fails. Use arcade.make_circle_texture(diameter, color) instead.
OpenGLFramebuffer.clear() takes color=(r,g,b,a) kwarg not positional args.

module_map.vector_ships.py: Geometry dataclasses + VectorShipRenderer + load_library(). DO NOT add hardcoded geometry here.
module_map.vector_editor.py: Standalone Arcade editor app. Saves to category JSON files.
module_map.damage_model.py: DamageModel — 3 layer (shields/armour/hull), 8 damage types, DoT, regen
module_map.ai_controller.py: AIController — weighted behaviour scoring, faction logic, formation flying
module_map.ai_data.py: Faction, Behaviour, Condition, ShipTypeData, FactionData enums + dataclasses
module_map.ai_scorer.py: BehaviourScorer — evaluates conditions, selects behaviour per frame
module_map.galaxy_generator.py: Voronoi galaxy generation with faction territories
module_map.weapon_effects.py: EffectManager — projectiles, beams, shockwaves, bloom renderer
module_map.weapon_effects_data.py: EFFECTS dict — all weapon profiles. Add new weapons here as data not code.
module_map.weapon_shaders.py: GLSL shader source strings. Do not edit unless instructed by Claude.
module_map.sound_manager.py: PLANNED — spatial audio, distance attenuation, doppler, layered drones
module_map.ships.json: Editor-created ships. Loaded at runtime via load_library()

do_not_touch: weapon_shaders.py — GLSL only, Claude handles this
ai_scorer.py scoring weights — behaviour balance is deliberate
damage_model.py interaction matrix — damage type interactions are designed

tasks._note: Claude writes tasks here. Cursor implements them. Mark status as you go.

TASK_001.title: Wire load_libraries() into game startup
TASK_001.description: Add library loading to the main game entry point so all JSON geometry files are loaded before any ship is spawned.
TASK_001.test: Print len(SHIP_GEOMETRIES) after load — should be >= 5
TASK_001.do_not: Do not hardcode paths. Use os.path relative to __file__.

TASK_002.title: Connect VectorShipRenderer to AIShip drawing
TASK_002.description: AIShip currently draws as a circle. Replace with VectorShipRenderer using the ship's race_id to pick geometry from SHIP_GEOMETRIES.
logic: Import VectorShipRenderer from vector_ships
Add _renderer = VectorShipRenderer() as class or module level singleton
In DemoAIShip draw or the game draw loop, call _renderer.draw_ship(ship.center_x, ship.center_y, angle_radians, geometry_id)
geometry_id lookup: use RACE_TO_GEOMETRY dict defined below
angle: AIShip stores angle in degrees — convert to radians: math.radians(ship.angle)
TASK_002.test: Run vector_demo.py — ships should render as vector geometry not circles
TASK_002.do_not: Do not remove the arcade.Sprite base class yet — physics still uses it

TASK_003.title: Wire DestructionManager to ship death
TASK_003.description: When an AIShip health reaches 0, trigger DestructionManager.destroy_ship() with the ship's position, angle and geometry_id.
logic: Import DestructionManager from destruction_effects
Create a single DestructionManager instance in the game window __init__
In AIShip.take_damage(), when health <= 0 call: dest_mgr.destroy_ship(x, y, angle_rad, geometry_id, velocity=(vx,vy))
In game on_update(), call: dest_mgr.update(dt) and check returned shockwaves for damage
In game on_draw(), call: dest_mgr.draw() BEFORE drawing live ships
TASK_003.do_not: Do not call destroy_ship more than once per death. Use a died flag on the ship.

TASK_004.title: Add ScreenShake to explosion events
TASK_004.description: Wire ScreenShake to explosion and shockwave events so the camera shakes on impact.
logic: Import ScreenShake from screen_effects
Create shake = ScreenShake() in game __init__
In game on_update(), call shake.update(dt)
When a ship dies: shake.add_trauma(0.6)
When player takes a hit: shake.add_trauma(0.4 * damage_fraction)
When Hive suicidal shockwave hits player: shake.add_trauma(1.0)
Apply offset in on_draw() — see note below
TASK_004.camera_offset_note: Arcade 3.x camera: get ox,oy = shake.get_offset() then translate drawing with arcade camera or manual offset. Ask Claude if unsure about camera API.
TASK_004.do_not: Do not apply shake offset to HUD elements — only world space drawing.

TASK_005.title: Add engine trails to all ships
TASK_005.description: Register each ship with TrailManager and update position each frame.
logic: Import TrailManager from screen_effects
Create trails = TrailManager() in game __init__
On ship spawn: trails.register_engine(id(ship), ENGINE_COLORS[race_id], width=2.0)
In on_update(): trails.update_engine(id(ship), ship.center_x, ship.center_y, alive=ship.alive, dt=dt)
In on_update(): trails.update(dt)
In on_draw(): trails.draw() BEFORE drawing ships

ISSUE_001.description: Editor local space (Y up, origin centre) may not match game world space. Scale factor TBD after first test run.
ISSUE_001.fix_owner: Claude — will specify exact transform after seeing editor output vs game coordinates

ISSUE_002.description: DemoAIShip still uses circle texture fallback. Blocked on TASK_002.

design_decisions._note: These are final. Do not change without discussing with Claude.

energy_system.description: Three interconnected pools: weapons, shields, drive. All draw from one POWER_CORE that regenerates. Solar proximity boosts regen rate. Not yet implemented — Claude will spec this fully.

nemesis.description: Unknown faction. Predates all races. ~2% spawn chance in deep red space nodes. No energy system — does not run out. First encounter is designed to be survived only by running. Sound: ambient drone shifts on detection.
nemesis.do_not: Do not implement this without full spec from Claude. Too many systems involved.

hive_suicidal_drones.description: Hive drone death triggers shockwave + acid cloud. Hive ships immune to own clouds. Implemented in hive_drone geometry (death_shockwave_radius=80, toxic_cloud_type=acid).

design_decisions.combat_feel_reference: Subspace / Continuum — fast, momentum-based, readable feedback, ships feel physically distinct
design_decisions.sound_target: Elite Dangerous level spatial audio — distance attenuation, stereo pan, doppler shift, layered engine drones
